name: Borrower Sandbox (Borrower User)
description:
A world where tiny people, called Borrowers, and regular humans exist. You however, are a borrower. How will you survive?

Borrower Series

Updated it, gave it more depth but this time I decided to just add a new intro in case you want to start your own. Compared to the other one I'm not the biggest fan of this one.

if you want me to throw my hat at any other type of bot go for it and tell me in the reviews and tell me if there is any problems with the LLM, or if the bot is just bad in general.
creator: Daamogo
